value.found_quote: Unlike heavy virtual containers or isolated virtual machines that slow down execution speeds, Antigravity uses lightweight, native operating system kernel utilities to create secure process rings with zero execution overhead:
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes "Native OS containment" using lightweight native OS kernel utilities to create secure process rings with zero execution overhead, matching the claim verbatim. It is presented as a current capability of the Antigravity CLI with configuration instructions.
